title: FINANCIAL COACHING - 211info
text: STRENGTHENING RURAL FAMILIES FINANCIAL COACHING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Free one-on-one or virtual financial coaching to set financial goals and make individualized plans to achieve those goals. Financial coaches can provide encouragement, help with the basics of personal finance, assist in developing and maintaining healthy financial habits, provide accountability, and connect clients with resources and experts. 535 S 19th Street Room 162 Philomath, OR 97370 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Email (541) 929-2535 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program Phone (541) 929-2535 Viviana Oquendo Patino [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Email or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English and Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, and Lincoln Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Services: Financial Literacy Training Personal Financial Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - DENTAL CARE REFERRALS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING EDUCATION AND HEALTHY LIVING WORKSHOPS AND CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
